no: Incompatable with Dimension Gate Also adds a buncha new pop culture-related spells & items and a new quest involving Boo!Dimension Gate and Ishlilka are seemingly incompatible!Install Dimension Gates before SpellFix Visual Effects!

sum: Ishlilka is a Wizard Slayer kit who can be found at the Friendly Arm Inn just north of the entrance.

co.n: Ishlilka mod for BGSoD and EET
